steps.title: Link observation to study
steps.content: Ortega first observed that wild mushrooms seemed colder than their surroundings, which raised questions about thermoregulation in fungi. The blank should show that this earlier observation motivated the later study.

steps.title: Choose the cause phrase
steps.content: A would mean the study was published in an observation, which is illogical. B would mean the study merely mentioned the observation. C would mean the observation left the study out or blocked it, contradicting the text. The remaining phrase means caused or motivated by. The answer is D.
